title: Evidence
description: An immutable, attributable observation about commercial reality. The root entity of the SALAM Kernel ontology. See kernel/ontology/evidence.md for full canonical definition, lifecycle, and rationale.

evidence_id.description: Canonical identifier. Never reused, even across versions.

subject_ref.description: The entity this evidence is about.

claim.description: The observation itself, in normalized form.

claim_type.description: Domain-specific classification of the claim. Open enum, extended via Specification layer (e.g. delivery_confirmation, payment_record, identity_document).

raw_payload_ref.description: Pointer to the original unprocessed source artifact, if one exists.

collected_at.description: When the observation occurred (not when it was ingested).

validated_at.description: Set once, when validation completes. Immutable thereafter.

confidence.description: System's current confidence in the claim's truth. Mutable/recalculable; derived from quality dimensions.

supersedes.description: Prior evidence_id this version replaces, if any.

links.description: Append-only. Other graph entities this evidence touches or strengthens/weakens.

archived.description: One-way transition false -> true. Evidence is archived, never deleted.

entity_type.description: References a Kernel ontology entity, e.g. Merchant, Transaction, Organization.

source_type.description: e.g. api_integration, human_submission, sensor, document_scan, third_party_service.

identifier.description: Identifier of the specific source instance (system name, user id, integration id).

QualityMetadata.description: Seven-dimension quality scoring. Mutable/recalculable as new corroborating or contradicting evidence arrives elsewhere in the graph.

ProvenanceMetadata.description: Append-only provenance chain. Nothing is ever removed from 'chain'.

origin.description: The original system, person, or process that generated the observation.

collection_method.description: Duplicated from top-level field for convenience in provenance queries.

chain.description: Ordered list of every transformation step applied since capture.

actor.description: System component or identity that performed the step.

ownership.description: Which participant/organization is accountable for this evidence's accuracy.

verification_confidence.description: Confidence in the provenance chain itself, separate from claim confidence.
